description: Goal: jobs/body lowers runtime bodies plus quoted-source values honestly, without letting source-phase concerns bleed across the whole lowerer. Signal: macro runtime lowering, quote/unquote lowering, and runtime body lowering have explicit boundaries; runtime bodies still reject unexpanded macro calls; quote/unquote-specific traversals live in a narrow quoted-lowering area instead of smearing through generic body logic. Strategy: after expansion and publication responsibilities are cleanly separated, factor quote/unquote lowering helpers behind a dedicated interface, keep compile-time macro bodies and runtime bodies on the same truthful lowering substrate, and remove duplicated source-only traversal where it no longer belongs.
title: Compiler2 quoted lowering: isolate quote/unquote on the shared lowering substrate
